zh.lifeSummary: Jacques Mahieu於大約1561年出生。他和Jenne至少有5個女兒。他於1584年住在英國肯特坎特布瑞。他去世在荷蘭霍蘭萊登，埋葬在荷蘭霍蘭萊登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jacques Mahieu于大约1561年出生。他和Jenne至少有5个女儿。他于1584年住在英国肯特坎特布瑞。他去世在荷兰霍蘭萊登，埋葬在荷兰霍蘭萊登。

nameMeanings.name: Mahieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Raoul, Armand, Pierre.
French (northern), Walloon, and Flemish: variant of   Mathieu  .
History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Mathieu
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Normand, Andre, Lucien, Pierre, Yvon, Armand, Rosaire, Alphonse, Dominique, Emile, Fernand.
French and Walloon: from the French personal name Mathieu, vernacular derivative of Latin Mathias or Matthaeus (see Matthew ). Compare Matthieu .

nameMeanings.name: Jacques
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of James and Jacob . In French there is no distinction between a form corresponding to Jacob and a form corresponding to James. This is a perennially popular French given name, and Jacques or Jacques Bonhomme has been used (like John Bull in English) as a typification of the ordinary citizen. In Shakespeare's time it was also used as an English name, pronounced ‘jay-kwez’, as in the case of the melancholy character Jacques in As You Like It. Though rarely, if ever, now used in Britain it is found in the United States.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.
Britain waged wars against the Dutch.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.

en.lifeSummary: Jacques Mahieu was born about 1561. He had at least 5 daughters with Jenne. He lived in Canterbury, Kent, England in 1584. He died in Leiden, Holland, Netherlands, and was buried in Leiden, Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Jacques Mahieu est né environ 1561. Il a eu au moins 5 filles avec Jenne. Il a vécu à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre en 1584. Il est décédé à Leiden, Holland, Pays-Bas, et a été enterré à Leiden, Holland, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Jacques Mahieu wurde um 1561 geboren. Er hatte mit Jenne mindestens 5 Töchter. 1584 hat er in Canterbury, Kent, England gelebt. Er starb in Leiden, Holland, Niederlande und wurde in Leiden, Holland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Jacques Mahieu è nato il circa 1561. Lui avuto almeno 5 figlie con Jenne. Vissuto a Canterbury, Kent, England nel 1584. Morì nel Leiden, Holland, Paesi Bassi, e fu sepolto a Leiden, Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Jacques Mahieuは約1561年に生まれた。彼はJenneとの間に少なくとも5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1584年にはイギリスケントカンテルブリーに住んでいた。彼はオランダホーランドレイデンで死去し，オランダホーランドレイデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jacques Mahieu(은)는 대략 1561년 태어났다. 그는 Jenne(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1584년도에 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 살았다. 그는 네덜란드 홀랜드 레이든에서 사망했으며 네덜란드 홀랜드 레이든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Jacques Mahieu nasceu aproximadamente 1561. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhas com Jenne. Ele viveu em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra em 1584. Ele faleceu em Leiden, Holland, Países Baixos, e foi sepultado em Leiden, Holland, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Jacques Mahieu родился около 1561 г. У него было по крайней мере 5 дочерей от Jenne. Он жил в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия в 1584 году. Он умер в местности лиден, холланд, Нидерланды и был похоронен в местности лиден, холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Jacques Mahieu nació aproximadamente 1561. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijas con Jenne. Vivió en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra en 1584. Murió en Leiden, Holland, Países Bajos, y fue sepultado en Leiden, Holland, Países Bajos.
